summary: FQ-13P0 is the foundational audit for the FQ-13P visual-consolidation arc (gates P1-P4): a standalone audit tool plus documentation, with no runtime/engine-consumed change, so the running game and the 283-check suite are provably unaffected. scripts/asset_audit.py scans art/generated/<category>/ against data/visual_assets.json and the data authorities (blocks/items/live enemies) and classifies every visual surface LIVE / AVAILABLE_NOT_CONSUMED / PLACEHOLDER_REQUIRED / FALLBACK_ONLY / DEFERRED; it reports variant pools present in non-consuming categories, the FALLBACK_ONLY data-vs-art gap, the reserved UI hook ids, and two note classes - informational FINDINGS vs strict-failing DATA BUGS (variant sequence gaps, wrong dimensions with width-only handling for backgrounds/opening, unreadable PNGs), with --strict failing on data bugs only. docs/UI_ASSET_GAPS.md is the human authority: a per-category runtime-consumer table (exact call sites, canonical-live vs variants-live, selection & fallback rules), HUD sub-surface placeholder hooks with reserved ids, findings/FALLBACK_ONLY/placeholder sections, the player cosmetic-variation decision, and a 'what remains temporary' tracking table. Headline finding: the enemy variant pools (cave_crawler/raider_basic/surface_slime _01..03, nine valid 16x16 PNGs) exist but simple_threat._draw reads only the canonical single - AVAILABLE_NOT_CONSUMED - which FQ-13P1 wires. Decision recorded (operator review requested): player cosmetic variation uses the bounded full-body pool approach reusing the FQ-09V <id>_NN.png convention with a character-owned, never-saved visual_variant index, layered composition deferred. Current audit state: 3 findings, 0 data bugs.
scope: FQ-13P0 per the operator's FQ-13P requirements - runtime asset & variant audit (docs/UI_ASSET_GAPS.md), an audit/report script (scripts/asset_audit.py), and the player cosmetic-variation design decision. No runtime code, scene, or engine-loaded data change; no placeholder PNGs authored yet (P1+).
next_action: FQ-13P1: consume enemy variant pools (deterministic, lifetime-stable per-enemy selection + smoke). Awaiting operator OK on the player full-body-pool direction before the player-variation slice.
